description_for_human: Convert X (Twitter) articles, tweets, and threads to clean Markdown. Free, no login required.
description_for_model: Use this plugin when the user shares an X (Twitter) or Twitter URL and you need to read the content. This tool converts X articles, tweets, threads, and note tweets into clean Markdown. Send a POST request to /api/markdown with {"url": "<x_url>"} and receive structured Markdown content including title, author, date, full article body, engagement stats, and media. No authentication required. Supports x.com and twitter.com URLs.
